---
title: "Portfolio Website"
author: "Alexandria Jaimes"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    css: presentation.css
---

## Portfolio Website

Alexandria Jaimes  
Digital Marketing Portfolio

---

## About Me

I’m a business student at Cal Poly Pomona interested in digital marketing, social media, content creation, and marketing analytics.

My goal is to use creativity and data to help brands connect with people in a clear and meaningful way.

---

## Purpose of My Website

This portfolio website was created to organize and showcase my class projects in one place.

It includes:

- Marketing projects
- Campaign analysis
- A dashboard
- A resume page
- A Revealjs presentation

---

## Featured Project: Pharmacy Boardshop

The project I’m most proud of is my group’s Pharmacy Boardshop influencer campaign.

For this project, we created a social media campaign focused on increasing brand awareness while still keeping the brand connected to real skate culture.

The campaign was built around:

- TikTok and Instagram
- Influencer marketing
- User-generated content
- Audience targeting
- Campaign KPIs

---

## Why This Project Stands Out

I’m proud of this project because it connected creativity with strategy.

Instead of just making a basic social media campaign, we thought about:

- Who the audience was
- Which platforms made the most sense
- What kind of influencers fit the brand
- How the campaign could be measured
- How to keep the idea authentic

---

## Guinness Campaign Analysis

I also analyzed Guinness’s Welcome Back / Looks Like Guinness campaign.

This project helped me understand how a strong brand identity can make a campaign memorable across different platforms.

The campaign showed how simple visuals, emotional messaging, and consistent media channels can work together.

---

## Dashboard

My dashboard uses sample campaign performance data to show how a digital marketing campaign can track platform performance.

The dashboard compares:

- Reach
- Engagement
- Clicks
- Engagement rate

---

## Skills Shown

This portfolio shows skills I’ve practiced in class, including:

- Digital marketing strategy
- Social media campaign planning
- Brand campaign analysis
- Data visualization
- R and Quarto
- GitHub Pages publishing
- Website organization

---

## What I Learned

This project helped me understand how websites can be used as professional portfolios.

I also practiced building pages, linking files, creating a dashboard, creating slides, and publishing a website through GitHub Pages.

---

## Thank You

Thank you for viewing my portfolio.

[Back to Dashboard](dashboard.html)
